#define DISPATCH   goto dispatch

Dispatches the next interpreter, jumps back to the interpreter prolog or straight to the next opcode

#define INTERPRETER_PROLOG
Value:
dispatch:\
    switch (*pc) {

Macro used for creating the prolog of the interpreter, expands into the head of a switch statement if the labels-as-values extension is not available, into a direct jump otherwise
